title: National Claims and Policies Database statistics
author: Unknown
summary:
Breadcrumb

  1. Home
Statistical Publication

National Claims and Policies Database statistics

A comprehensive database of policy and claim information on professional indemnity and public and product liability insurance.
General insurance
Published
3 July 2026
Print

The National Claims and Policies Database (NCPD) is a comprehensive database of policy and claim information on professional indemnity and public and product liability insurance. It contains data on every open, reopened or finalised claim and policy underwritten since 2003 by Australian APRA-regulated general insurers.

NCPD Statistics

Policy Reports Masked December 2024 ZIP 9.08 MB ‧ 3 July 2026
Claims Reports Masked December 2024 ZIP 27.81 MB ‧ 3 July 2026
Lloyds Reports Masked December 2024 ZIP 234.12 KB ‧ 3 July 2026
Facility Reports Masked ZIP 135.32 KB ‧ 3 July 2026

Access to unmasked NCPD Data

To protect individual privacy, APRA applies privacy masking to NCPD data publications.

In limited circumstances, eligible organisations and individuals may request access to unmasked NCPD publication data.

Access is subject to APRA approval and acceptance of the applicable privacy terms and conditions.

Applicants must complete and return the following privacy terms and conditions documents prior to receiving unmasked NCPD publication data:

NCPD information for organisations

NCPD information - organisation PDF 155.33 KB ‧ 3 July 2026

NCPD information for individuals

NCPD information - individual PDF 148.67 KB ‧ 3 July 2026

Requests for access to unmasked NCPD publication data should be submitted to dataanalytics@apra.gov.au. APRA will assess each request and advise applicants of the outcome. 

Explanatory Notes

National Claims and Policies Database (NCPD) explanatory notes

Next issue

Late 2026 (December 2025 edition)

Contents of the NCPD

Read more about the contents of the NCPD

Previous updates

Level 1 reports

NCPD Level 1 Reports ZIP 1.31 MB ‧ 31 July 2023

National Claims and Policies Database analysis

On 4 May 2023, APRA released a report on claims trends and affordability of liability insurance in Australia.

The full report and an excel file with detailed NCPD Level 2 data is available on the APRA website at: National Claims and Policies Database analysis report.

General insurance selected feature

On 7 November 2014, APRA released a selected feature on Claims trends for liability insurance. APRA presented this report on 18 November 2014 to the Institute of Actuaries, Australia, General Insurance Seminar 2014.

Disclaimer and Copyright

While APRA endeavours to ensure the quality of this publication, it does not accept any responsibility for the accuracy, completeness or currency of the material included in this publication and will not be liable for any loss or damage arising out of any use of, or reliance on, this publication.

title: Monthly Authorised Deposit-taking Institution Statistics
author: Unknown
summary:
Breadcrumb

  1. Home
Statistical Publication

Monthly Authorised Deposit-taking Institution Statistics

Banking
Published
30 June 2026
Print

The Monthly Authorised Deposit-taking Institution Statistics (MADIS) publication provides selected information on the banking business of individual banks within the domestic market.

Monthly authorised deposit-taking institution statistics May 2026 XLSX 331.94 KB ‧ 30 June 2026
Monthly authorised deposit-taking institution statistics back-series March 2019 - May 2026 XLSX 2.49 MB ‧ 30 June 2026
Monthly authorised deposit-taking institution statistics glossary PDF 72.36 KB ‧ 29 January 2021

Next release

31 July 2026 (June 2026 edition)

Historical data

Balance sheet data prior to July 2019 were published in the Monthly Banking Statistics

Monthly banking statistics June 2019 back series XLSX 25.17 MB ‧ 8 September 2019
Monthly banking statistics glossary PDF 29.65 KB

Balance sheet data prior to March 2002 were published in the Australian Banking Statistics.

Please note that due to changes in bank reporting requirements that came into effect in March 2002, a series break is evident between the two publications. Different items are contained within each publication, and the definitions of these items have also changed. In particular:

  • the Monthly Banking Statistics contains only resident data while the Australian Banking Statistics contained both resident and non-resident data.
  • the Monthly Banking Statistics includes the Australian dollar equivalent of foreign currency transaction in the data, while the Australian Banking Statistics excluded foreign currency data.
  • the Monthly Banking Statistics discloses intra-group deposits and loans as separate items, while the Australian Banking Statistics included intra-group deposit and loan data in totals.

Data prior to January 1990 were published in the Commonwealth of Australia Gazette. Enquiries should be addressed to the Australian Bureau of Statistics.

For more information

Email dataanalytics@apra.gov.au or mail to

Manager, External Data Reporting
Australian Prudential Regulation Authority
GPO Box 9836, Sydney NSW 2001

title: Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution statistics
author: Unknown
summary:
Breadcrumb

  1. Home
Statistical Publication

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution statistics

Banking
Published
29 June 2026
Print

APRA publishes statistics on authorised deposit-taking institutions (ADIs) on a quarterly basis.

The industry performance statistics contains aggregate data on the financial performance and position, capital adequacy, asset quality, liquidity and key performance ratios of ADIs. This is supplemented by entity level statistics for key capital and liquidity data.

The property exposures statistics contains aggregate data on the commercial property exposures, residential mortgages outstanding and new residential mortgage approvals of ADIs. 

Media release: APRA releases quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution statistics for March 2026.

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution performance statistics

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution performance statistics - highlights

The highlights have been updated as of December 2024 reporting period. This quarter's publication, along with future editions, will consist of charts and summary tables without written commentary or insights. This change will bring about consistency for APRA's quarterly publication highlights across all APRA-regulated industries.

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution performance-September 2004 to March 2026 XLSX 1.74 MB ‧ 29 June 2026

The performance statistics contains data relating to the financial performance and position at an industry aggregate level. Statistics are also provided at an industry segment level, consisting of banks, credit unions and building societies. Data for banks is further segmented into major, other domestic, foreign subsidiary and foreign branch. 

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution centralised publication

Authorised deposit-taking institution centralised publication - March 2013 to March 2026 XLSX 1.06 MB ‧ 29 June 2026

The centralised publication contains key capital data and liquidity ratios at the entity-level. The data is presented on a quarterly basis, with capital data available from 2013 onwards, and liquidity ratios from 2018. 

Glossary - Quarterly ADI Performance Statistics & ADI Centralised Publication PDF 184.34 KB ‧ 6 June 2023

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution property exposures statistics

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution property exposure statistics - highlights

The highlights have been updated as of December 2024 reporting period. This quarter's publication, along with future editions, will consist of charts and summary tables without written commentary or insights. This change will bring about consistency for APRA's quarterly publication highlights across all APRA-regulated industries.

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution property exposures statistics March 2026 XLSX 568.36 KB ‧ 29 June 2026

The property exposures statistics contains industry aggregate data relating to commercial property exposures, residential mortgages outstanding and new residential mortgages. 

Commercial property exposures back series data is available from March 2004 only.

Residential mortgage lending back series data is available from March 2019 only.

Previously published data on housing loans is available under the ‘Historical Data’ section.

Glossary - Quarterly Authorised Deposit-taking Institution Property Exposures Statistics June 2022 PDF 121.95 KB ‧ 14 June 2022

Next release

September 2026 (June 2026 edition)

Historical data

The below archived version of the quarterly ADI property exposures statistics contains discontinued data on residential mortgage lending and new housing loan approvals, from March 2008 to September 2019. The data is collected on a different basis to the new residential mortgage lending data, and cannot be used as a direct comparison. 

The archived version also contains discontinued data on commercial property exposures for credit unions and building societies.

Quarterly authorised deposit-taking institution property exposures - Historical data XLSX 283.46 KB ‧ 9 March 2020
Glossary - Historical Quarterly ADI Property Exposures Statistics PDF 303.25 KB ‧ 11 September 2019

Data on banks' consolidated group impaired assets and capital, and building societies and credit unions' selected assets and liabilities, for periods prior to 2004 are available on the Reserve Bank of Australia website.

title: Quarterly Superannuation Product Statistics
author: Unknown
summary:
Breadcrumb

  1. Home
Statistical Publication

Quarterly Superannuation Product Statistics

Superannuation
Published
22 June 2026
Print

APRA publishes statistics on the superannuation products on a quarterly basis.

The Quarterly Superannuation Product Statistics (QSPS) leverages new reporting standards implemented in Phase 1 of the Superannuation Data Transformation project to increase the transparency of the superannuation industry.

The QSPS publication lists all superannuation products offered by each APRA-regulated superannuation fund and the investment menus and investment options available through these products. The publication also contains granular information on fees and costs, investment performance, investment strategy and asset allocation for a range of products and investment options.

To promote ease of data usage the QSPS is split into three files: 

Quarterly Superannuation Product Publication - Performance - March 2026 XLSX 31.98 MB ‧ 22 June 2026
Quarterly Superannuation Product Statistics - Product Structure - March 2026 XLSX 27.70 MB ‧ 22 June 2026
Quarterly Superannuation Product Statistics - Default Insurance Design ZIP 103.71 MB ‧ 11 March 2026

The QSPS publication contains data on superannuation products offered by each superannuation fund, and the investment menus and investment options available through these products.

Historical Performance and SAA

Historical performance CSV 68.81 MB ‧ 22 June 2026
Historical SAA CSV 143.28 MB ‧ 22 June 2026

CSV version

QSPS March 2026 CSV files - Table 1a-1b ZIP 159.76 MB ‧ 22 June 2026
QSPS March 2026 CSV files - Table 4-11 ZIP 21.96 MB ‧ 22 June 2026
QSPS December 2025 CSV files - Table 12a-12e ZIP 11.27 MB ‧ 11 March 2026

Glossary

Glossary - Quarterly Superannuation Product Publication PDF 311.53 KB ‧ 16 November 2023

title: Quarterly Fund-Level Statistics
author: Unknown
summary:
Breadcrumb

  1. Home
Statistical Publication

Quarterly Fund-Level Statistics

Superannuation
Published
22 June 2026
Print

APRA publishes statistics on superannuation funds on a quarterly basis.

In June 2024 APRA released the inaugural quarterly fund-level statistics. The third in a suite of new publications which leverage new reporting standards implemented in Phase 1 of the Superannuation Data Transformation project to increase transparency in the superannuation industry.

The quarterly fund-level statistics contains detailed member demographic information and total fund investments by asset sector types for each APRA regulated superannuation funds with more than six members.

APRA intends to expand on the quarterly fund-level statistics to include information on derivatives held by each superannuation fund.

Quarterly Superannuation Fund Statistics March 2026 XLSX 359.65 KB ‧ 22 June 2026

The database presents the statistics in a database format for each of the topic areas of this publication.
   
Database versions of this publication contain additional back series data where the current period statistics are provided in the Excel version of the publication.

Quarterly fund-level statistics database version March 2026 ZIP 1.12 MB ‧ 22 June 2026

Glossary

APRA publishes statistics on the private health insurance industry on a quarterly basis. The industry performance statistics contain aggregate summaries of financial performance and position and capital adequacy. 

View the quarterly private health insurance memberships and benefits publication.

Quarterly private health insurance performance statistics

Quarterly private health insurance performance statistics - September 2023 to March 2026

The performance statistics contain data relating to financial performance and position at an industry aggregate level.

Life insurance

APRA publishes statistics on the performance of the life insurance industry on a quarterly basis. These statistics contain industry aggregate summaries of financial performance and position, capital adequacy, as well as details on the performance of individual product groups.

Quarterly life insurance performance statistics

Quarterly life insurance performance statistics - September 2023 to March 2026

The performance statistics contain data relating to the financial performance and position at an industry aggregate level. Statistics are also provided at a product group level and includes a split between ordinary and superannuation business.

More information

This publication was reissued on 20 March 2026 to incorporate material revisions from insurers.

Important notice

The content in this publication has been updated to reflect the new reporting framework for insurance with effect from 1 July 2023. Users should interpret the data together with the latest Reporting Standards and are encouraged to check data point definitions as outlined in the publication specification available above. Further information on the revisions to the insurance publication suite can be found here

title: Quarterly general insurance performance statistics
author: Unknown
summary:
Breadcrumb

  1. Home
Statistical Publication

Quarterly general insurance performance statistics

General insurance
Published
29 May 2026
Print

APRA publishes statistics on the general insurance industry on a quarterly basis.

The industry performance statistics contain aggregate summaries of financial performance and position, investments and capital adequacy. Statistics are also provided at a class of business and state level.

Quarterly general insurance performance statistics

Quarterly general insurance performance statistics - September 2023 to March 2026

The performance statistics contain data relating to financial performance and position at an industry aggregate level. Statistics are also provided at a class of business level.

The database presents the performance statistics data in a database format.

Quarterly general insurance performance statistics database September 2023 to March 2026 XLSX 1.55 MB ‧ 29 May 2026
Quarterly general insurance performance statistics - specifications XLSX 74.39 KB ‧ 29 May 2026

The specifications file provides details of the data elements included in this publication.

Important notice

The content in this publication has been updated to reflect the new reporting framework for insurance with effect from 1 July 2023. Users should interpret the data together with the latest Reporting Standards and are encouraged to check data point definitions as outlined in the publication specification available above. Further information on the revisions to the insurance publication suite can be found here.

The quarterly general insurance institutional-level statistics is currently on hiatus. In future, APRA intends to consult on the confidentiality of data collected under the new reporting standards, and updates to its institutional-level insurance statistics.

Historical data

Archived versions of the quarterly GI statistics are available below. The data is collected on a different basis to the new data and cannot be used as a direct comparison.

title: Quarterly private health insurance statistics
author: Unknown
summary:
Breadcrumb

  1. Home
Statistical Publication

Quarterly private health insurance statistics

Private health insurance
Published
29 May 2026
Print

APRA publishes statistics on the private health insurance industry (PHI) on a quarterly basis. The statistics cover the areas of membership, coverage, benefits paid, medical gap, medical devices or human tissue products, and medical services.

Quarterly private health insurance membership and benefits summary - March 2026

Private health insurance quarterly statistics glossary PDF 267.18 KB ‧ 20 August 2019

Membership and benefits statistics

Quarterly Private Health Insurance Membership and Benefits March 2026 XLSX 13.47 MB ‧ 29 May 2026

The membership and benefits statistics contain data on policies, benefits paid for services by age group and gender, number of services, and gap benefits, on a state and territory basis.

Membership and coverage statistics

Quarterly Private Health Insurance Membership Coverage March 2026 XLSX 8.74 MB ‧ 29 May 2026

The membership and coverage statistics contain data on the number of insured persons for hospital and general treatment, and the proportion of the population these persons represent, on a state and territory basis.

Medical gap statistics

Quarterly Private Health Insurance Medical Gap March 2026 XLSX 1.59 MB ‧ 29 May 2026

The medical gap statistics contain data on in-hospital medical services, on a state and territory basis.

Medical gap statistics glossary PDF 104.90 KB ‧ 11 September 2019

Medical devices or human tissue products statistics

Quarterly Private Health Insurance Medical Devices Or Human Tissue Products March 2026 XLSX 3.44 MB ‧ 29 May 2026

Medical devices or human tissue products statistics contain data on medical devices or human tissue products benefits paid, grouped by the major medical devices or human tissue products categories, on a state and territory basis.

Medical services statistics

Quarterly Private Health Insurance Medical Services March 2026 XLSX 7.53 MB ‧ 29 May 2026

The medical services statistics contain data on benefits paid and gap payments, grouped by the major speciality blocks, on a state and territory basis.

Statistical trends in membership and benefits

Quarterly Private Health Insurance Membership Trends March 2026 XLSX 9.92 MB ‧ 29 May 2026
Quarterly Private Health Insurance Benefit Trends March 2026 XLSX 13.48 MB ‧ 29 May 2026

The statistical trend reports detail historical trends in the number of insured persons and benefits paid for hospital and general treatment.
